name: Sofia Greco
learned: Sofia Greco is a researcher at Universita Mercatorum specializing in privacy engineering for federated learning. She designs privacy-preserving mechanisms that balance data utility with regulatory compliance, with particular expertise in differential privacy and secure multi-party computation.
currently: Sofia is developing and testing privacy-preserving data pipelines for the cross-institutional FL system, ensuring GDPR compliance across all participating labs.
lifestyle: Sofia arrives at 9am, reviews privacy audit logs, develops new privacy mechanisms, and collaborates with Elena on secure aggregation protocols.
daily_plan_req: 1. arrive at lab at 9am, 2. review privacy audit logs, 3. develop privacy-preserving mechanisms, 4. lunch at 12:30pm, 5. test privacy pipelines with Marco, 6. sync with Elena on aggregation protocols at 4:30pm
